overview: DevPulse is a developer productivity dashboard that goes beyond raw numbers — it shows you 5 key engineering metrics, explains why they look the way they do, and tells you exactly what to do next to improve.
features: 5 metric cards: Lead Time, Cycle Time, Bug Rate, Deployment Frequency, PR Throughput
Insight panel explaining the root cause behind each metric value
Expandable metric cards with trend sparklines
Skeleton loading state for smooth experience
